sampled.snippet: Exhaustive case-insensitive search across content.txt and all sections/*.txt for 'U-Net', 'UNet', 'U Net', 'neural network', 'CNN', 'convolutional', 'encoder', 'decoder', 'baseline model', 'architecture', 'challenge baseline', 'Zbontar', '1811.08839' returned ZERO matches for the architectural-content terms. The Zbontar / arXiv:1811.08839 deferral pointer was found at the end of the article.

observed.at_claimed_location: rg -i 'U-Net|UNet|encoder|decoder|baseline model|convolutional' on pdfs/knoll2020/content.txt: ZERO matches. rg -i 'U-Net|UNet|encoder|decoder|baseline model|convolutional|CNN|neural network|architecture' on pdfs/knoll2020/sections/: ZERO matches. rg -i 'Zbontar|1811.08839' on content.txt: 1 hit at L11 [p4] -- 'Complete details regarding this dataset, as well as relevant background material intended to empower investigators to tackle problems in image reconstruction, can be found in Zbontar et al (19).' (Note: the bare arXiv id '1811.08839' is not present as a literal string in the extracted text; the deferral is via reference number (19) to Zbontar et al., which the verdict identifies as arXiv:1811.08839.)
observed.note: Absence of any U-Net/architecture content is fully confirmed; the Zbontar deferral pointer is present at content.txt L11 [p4]. Both halves of the negative-evidence claim hold.
